overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic urban downtown. The player walks under elevated highways, crosses wet reflective streets, and explores a dense cityscape with towering buildings, digital billboards, and industrial architecture.

events.description: pedestrian approaches from ahead and passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange metal walkway beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera and passing by on the left side

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass structure spanning overhead
textured orange metal walkway surface with geometric patterns
large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway
tall street lamps illuminating the walkway with warm light
faint glowing commercial signs visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered orange metal walkway beneath an elevated highway structure. The environment is dimly lit by street lamps, with massive concrete pillars lining the path. A pedestrian approaches from the distance and passes by as the camera continues toward an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner under elevated infrastructure

events.description: exits covered walkway and steps onto open street crosswalk
passes red street sign reading Anderson while walking along sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crosses the wet asphalt street and continues along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway

entered.detail: red rectangular street sign with white text reading Anderson
illuminated blue vending machine on the sidewalk
wet reflective asphalt road with red painted crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens to a wet street intersection beneath the massive elevated highway. The camera crosses the red-marked crosswalk and continues along the concrete sidewalk, passing a street sign for Anderson and an illuminated vending machine.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with stairs and digital billboards

events.description: overtakes pedestrian walking in same direction ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk approaching a commercial district with large digital displays

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing red pants

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to building entrance
massive illuminated advertising screens on distant buildings
tall palm tree visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the urban sidewalk with a concrete staircase visible on the left. The camera approaches a commercial district with massive digital billboards illuminating the night, passing a pedestrian in red pants while the elevated highway remains visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with tall commercial buildings

events.description: turns right at street corner to face intersection
camera tilts upward to look at building facade and overhead structure

agents.ego_description: turns right at the intersection and stops to look up at the towering building architecture

notable_agents.action: crossing the street at the intersection

entered.detail: street corner with crosswalk markings and curb
tall vertical building banner with decorative imagery
vehicles parked along the street curb
large illuminated sign reading The Information Is Not Only For The Rich

segments.scene_description: Turning right at the intersection reveals a busy corner with parked vehicles and towering buildings adorned with massive vertical banners and digital signage. The player character stops to pan the camera upward, admiring the imposing architecture and illuminated billboards before returning to street level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dimly lit industrial underpass into the vibrant, neon-soaked heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins along a covered orange metal walkway beneath an elevated highway, moving past massive concrete pillars and a passing pedestrian toward a distant intersection. As the camera exits the shelter, the environment opens onto a wet, reflective street where it crosses a red-marked crosswalk and passes an illuminated vending machine. The scene then shifts toward a denser urban corridor, gliding past a concrete staircase and a pedestrian in red pants while massive digital billboards begin to dominate the night sky. Finally, the camera turns right at a busy corner filled with parked vehicles, panning upward to take in the towering architecture and glowing vertical banners before returning to street level.
